title: Caprifolium angustifolium
taxonomy: Caprifolium angustifolium is classified as a species within the genus Caprifolium, which belongs to the family Caprifoliaceae. This family is commonly known as the honeysuckle or caprifoliaceous family. The genus Caprifolium is closely related to the genus Lonicera, which includes the well-known honeysuckle species.
